## How to test

<!-- e.g. pytest, manual Streamlit steps, API curl -->

- [ ] `pytest dashboard/tests` (or CI green)
- [ ] `pytest backend/smoke_test.py` with `DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///...` (if backend touched)

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets / `.env` committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or setup changed (README, DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE, docs/)
